# PHCollectionListType.folder

**Case**

A folder containing asset collections of type [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetCollectionType/album] or [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetCollectionType/smartAlbum].

## Declaration

```swift
case folder
```

## Constants

- **PHCollectionListType.momentList**: A group of asset collections of type [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetCollectionType/moment].
- **PHCollectionListType.smartFolder**: A smart folder synced to the device from .
